results.title: Hindalco Eyes ₹1,000-Cr Revenue From Eternia Business By 2028; New Copper Recycling Plant Soon
results.description: Hindalco to double down on value-added business; eyes ₹1,000-crore fenestration revenue by 2028. In an exclusive interaction, Hindalco MD Satish Pai outlines the company's aggressive pivot toward high-margin, value-added products, aiming to tap into a ₹50,000-crore fenestration market and enter the modular kitchen segment. As geopolitical tensions in West Asia push aluminium prices higher, Pai discusses the impact on the company's topline, a strong FY27 order book, and upcoming critical mineral extraction at its new copper recycling plant slated for October 2026.
